first.description: Indicates whether current page is the first page.

hasNext.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

hasPrevious.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

last.description: Indicates whether current page is the last page.

page.description: Page number, starts from 1. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

size.description: Size of each page. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

ownerName.description: Name of User who uploads the attachment

size.description: Size of attachment. Unit is Byte

Permalink of attachment.
If it is in local storage, the public URL will be set.
If it is in s3 storage, the Object URL will be set.

authenticationUrl.description: Authentication url of the auth provider

displayName.description: Display name of the auth provider

lastModifiedTime.description: Last modified time of backup file.

Category.description: Category extension for grouping posts and building category archives.

cover.description: Cover image URL or attachment URI of the category.

hideFromList.description:
Hides this root category tree and its posts from theme-side lists. Permalinks remain accessible, and only
 root categories are expected to set this flag.

postTemplate.description: Theme template used for posts in this category when the post does not specify its own spec.template.

preventParentPostCascadeQuery.description:
Stops parent category post queries from cascading into this category tree. Direct post queries for this
 category are unaffected.

priority.description: Sorting priority. Higher values sort before lower values where priority ordering is applied.

slug.description: URL slug used to build the category permalink.

template.description: Theme template used to render the category archive page.

CategorySpec.description: Desired display, hierarchy, and rendering configuration of a category.

permalink.description: Absolute permalink calculated from the category permalink policy.

postCount.description: Total number of posts in this category and all descendant categories.

visiblePostCount.description: Total number of published and public posts in this category and all descendant categories.

Comment.description: Comment extension for a post, single page, or another commentable subject.

avatar.description: Avatar URL of the guest commenter.

displayName.description: Display name of the guest commenter.

email.description: Email address of the guest commenter. It is used as the owner name when present.

website.description: Website URL of the guest commenter.

CommentEmailOwner.description: Guest/email owner information used when a comment is not owned by a Halo user.

annotations.description: Additional owner metadata, such as avatar, website, or email hash.

displayName.description: Display name shown for the owner.

kind.description: Owner identity kind. Built-in values are User and Email.

name.description: Owner identifier. For User owners, this is the User metadata.name; for Email owners, an email address.

CommentOwner.description: Identity of a comment or reply owner.

allowNotification.description: Whether to subscribe the owner to notifications for future replies.

content.description: Rendered HTML content for the comment. Unsafe HTML is rejected.

hidden.description: Whether the comment should be hidden from normal display.

raw.description: Original comment text submitted by the editor.

CommentRequest.description: Comment creation payload for console comment APIs.

allowNotification.description: Whether notification subscriptions should be created for this comment or reply.

approved.description: Whether the comment has passed moderation and may be visible.

approvedTime.description: Time when the comment was approved.

content.description: Rendered HTML content displayed to REST and theme consumers.

creationTime.description: Creation time supplied by the caller. If absent, metadata.creationTimestamp is used.

hidden.description: Whether the comment should be hidden from public REST and theme output.

ipAddress.description: IP address recorded when the comment was submitted.

lastReadTime.description: Latest time the comment owner has read replies for this comment.

priority.description: Sorting priority. Higher values sort before lower values where priority ordering is applied.

raw.description: Raw comment body submitted by the owner before HTML sanitization and rendering.

top.description: Whether the comment is pinned above normal comment ordering.

userAgent.description: Browser user agent recorded when the comment was submitted.

CommentSpec.description: Desired state of a top-level comment.

CommentStats.description: Aggregated counters for a comment or reply.

hasNewReply.description: Whether unreadReplyCount is greater than zero.

lastReplyTime.description: Creation time of the latest reply under this comment.

observedVersion.description: Metadata version observed by the last successful reconciliation.

replyCount.description: Total number of replies under this comment.

unreadReplyCount.description: Number of replies created after the comment owner's last read time.

visibleReplyCount.description: Total number of approved and non-hidden replies under this comment.

lastTransitionTime.description: Last time the condition transitioned from one status to another.

message.description: Human-readable message indicating details about last transition. This may be an empty string.

reason.description: Unique, one-word, CamelCase reason for the condition's last transition.

status.description: Status is the status of the condition. Can be True, False, Unknown.

type.description: type of condition in CamelCase or in foo.example.com/CamelCase. example: Ready, Initialized. maxLength: 316.

Condition.description: EqualsAndHashCode 排除了lastTransitionTime否则失败时，lastTransitionTime 会被更新 导致 equals 为 false，一直被加入队列.

ConfigMap.description: ConfigMap holds configuration data to consume.

content.description: Rendered HTML or normalized content derived from raw.

raw.description: Source text stored by the editor.

rawType.description: Editor/source format of the raw content, for example HTML or Markdown.

version.description: Expected current head snapshot version; conflicts create a new head snapshot.

autoGenerate.description: Whether Halo should generate the excerpt from the released content automatically.

raw.description: Manual excerpt text used when autoGenerate is false.

generateName.description: The name field will be generated automatically according to the given generateName field

version.description: Current version of the Extension. It will be bumped up every update.

from.description: A JSON Pointer path pointing to the location to move/copy from.

path.description: A JSON Pointer path pointing to the location to move/copy from.

kind.description: Owner kind, such as User or email.

name.description: Owner name. For Halo users, this is the user metadata name.

OwnerInfo.description: Resolved owner summary for a comment or reply.

presetName.description: Plugin preset name. We will find the plugin from plugin presets

first.description: Indicates whether current page is the first page.

hasNext.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

hasPrevious.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

last.description: Indicates whether current page is the last page.

size.description: Size of each page. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

loadLocation.description: Load location of the plugin, often a path.

apiGroups.description:
APIGroups is the name of the APIGroup that contains the resources. If multiple API groups are specified, any
 action requested against one of the enumerated resources in any API group will be allowed.

nonResourceURLs.description:
NonResourceURLs is a set of partial urls that a user should have access to. *s are allowed, but only as the
 full, final step in the path If an action is not a resource API request, then the URL is split on '/' and is
 checked against the NonResourceURLs to look for a match. Since non-resource URLs are not namespaced, this
 field is only applicable for ClusterRoles referenced from a ClusterRoleBinding. Rules can either apply to API
 resources (such as "pods" or "secrets") or non-resource URL paths (such as "/api"), but not both.

resourceNames.description:
ResourceNames is an optional white list of names that the rule applies to. An empty set means that everything
 is allowed.

resources.description:
Resources is a list of resources this rule applies to. '*' represents all resources in the specified
 apiGroups. '*/foo' represents the subresource 'foo' for all resources in the specified apiGroups.

verbs.description: about who the rule applies to or which namespace the rule applies to.

PolicyRule.description:
PolicyRule holds information that describes a policy rule, but does not contain information about whom the rule
 applies to or which namespace the rule applies to.

PostRequest.description: Post editor payload containing the post extension and its editable content.

allowComment.description: Whether new comments are allowed for this post.

baseSnapshot.description: Base Snapshot metadata.name used to reconstruct raw and rendered content from patches.

categories.description: Category metadata.name values associated with the post.

cover.description: Cover image URL or attachment URI of the post.

deleted.description: Whether the post is logically deleted and should be treated as recycled.

headSnapshot.description: Snapshot metadata.name containing the latest editable draft content.

htmlMetas.description: HTML meta tag attribute maps injected into the rendered post page head.

pinned.description: Whether the post should be pinned ahead of normal post ordering.

publish.description: Desired publish state. False keeps the post as a draft or moves it back to draft.

releaseSnapshot.description: Snapshot metadata.name selected as the published content version.

tags.description: Tag metadata.name values associated with the post.

template.description: Theme template used to render this post.

visible.description: Visibility used by theme-side and public REST queries; anonymous clients only receive PUBLIC posts.

phase.description: Current publishing phase, such as DRAFT, PENDING_APPROVAL, PUBLISHED, or FAILED.
